B

Ballot - Class in main
Abstract class representing Ballot for election.

Constructor for Ballot.
BallotFileReader - Class in main
Class for reading and processing ballot data from ballot file.
BallotFileReader() - Constructor for class main.BallotFileReader
 
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
Breaks ties by randomly ordering tied candidates.
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
Breaks ties between candidates using ballot timestamp logic.

C

calculateDroopQuota(int, int) - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
Calculates the minimum votes needed to win a seat (Droop quota).
counterList - Variable in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
Stores the number of votes each candidate received.
counterList - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm
Array of lists tracking ballots assigned to each candidate

D

displayResults() - Method in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
Displays the election results to the console.
displayResults() - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
 
droopQuota - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm
The minimum votes required to win a seat (Droop quota)

E

electedList - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm
Ordered map of elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)
election - Variable in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
The election object containing candidates and ballots.
election - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm
The election instance being processed
Election - Class in main
Election is the main driver class of the voting system.
Election() - Constructor for class main.Election
 
equals(Object) - Method in class main.Ballot
Method to compare ballots.

F

firstBallotTimes - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm
Tracks when each candidate received their first ballot

getAlgorithm() - Method in class main.InitialInput
Gets election algorithm selected.

Gets name of audit file.

Gets list of ballots cast in election.

getId() - Method in class main.STVBallot
Gets the id of the ballot.
getInput() - Method in class main.Election
Gets input for the elction.
getNumSeats() - Method in class main.Election
Gets number of seats.
getNumSeats() - Method in class main.InitialInput
Gets number of seats in election.
getPreference() - Method in class main.STVBallot
Gets the preference number of the ballot.
getShuffle() - Method in class main.STVInput
Gets whether ballot should be shuffled or not
getVote() - Method in class main.Ballot

I

incrementPreference() - Method in class main.STVBallot
Increments the preference of the ballot for redistribution.

Abstract class representing initial input for election.

loserList - Variable in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
List of candidates who lost the election.

main - package main

Main method to run election program.

N

nonElectedList - Variable in class main.STVAlgorithm

Implements the Plurality voting algorithm.

Class that extends Ballot to represent a Plurality Ballot.

PluralityInput - Class in main
Class extending InitialInput representing a plurality election input.

R

readBallots(String, String) - Method in class main.BallotFileReader
Reads ballot from given ballot file.
readCandidates(String) - Method in class main.BallotFileReader
Reads candidates from ballot file.
redistributeCandidateBallots(List<Ballot>) - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
Manages the core STV process including: - Call shuffleBallots() - Distribute all ballot to allCandidate - Election of candidates who reach quota - Call redistributeSurplusBallots() - Call eliminateWeakestCandidate() - Call determineWinnersAndLosers()
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
 
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
Executes the STV voting algorithm.

S

setAuditFileName(String) - Method in class main.STVInput
Sets name of audit file.
setCandidates(String[]) - Method in class main.Election
Sets the candidates for the election.
setInput(InitialInput) - Method in class main.Election
Sets the initial input for the election.
setShuffle(boolean) - Method in class main.STVInput
Sets shuffle flag.
shuffleBallots(List<Ballot>, boolean) - Method in class main.STVAlgorithm
Shuffles the list of ballots if shuffle is true.
sortCanList - Variable in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
Sorted list of candidate names based on votes.
sortVoteList - Variable in class main.PluralityAlgorithm
Sorted list of vote counts corresponding to `sortCanList`.
STVAlgorithm - Class in main
STVAlgorithm class implementing the STV voting method.
STVAlgorithm(Election) - Constructor for class main.STVAlgorithm
Constructs an STVAlgorithm instance.

Class extending Ballot that represents an stv election ballot.
